steps.name: $("#currentAddress") send keys(0616 Bryan Squares, Jeanettburgh, GA 88036-6228)
$(".table-responsive/by text: Student Name/By.xpath: ..") should have(partial text "Алина Сысоев")
$(".table-responsive/by text: Student Email/By.xpath: ..") should have(partial text "deja.krajcik@yahoo.com")
$(".table-responsive/by text: Date of Birth/By.xpath: ..") should have(partial text "26 July,1995")
